ShriAjay Achyutrao Deshpande, Flat 403, BuildingA-26, Happy Valley Homes, Manpada, Ghodbunder Road, Thane (W)-400607, Maharashtra, as the Expert Member of the National Green Tribunal with effect from 18th March, 2013 for a period offlve years or till he attains the age of sixty.five years, whichever is earlier.' 1175 Gl/20!3 [F: No. 17(30)/2012-PL/NGT] SURJIT SINGH, JI: Secy.
